g.text: Intel-Grade Technical Specification: Latency, Bandwidth, and Allocation Scope

ul.li: Overflow: Spills to 'Local Memory' (backed by L1/Global)
Occupancy Tuning: Monitor RegCount per thread; excessive usage limits active Warps.
Memory Coalescing: Ensure thread indices map to linear addresses for 128B DRAM bursts.
Shared Memory Tiling: Use __syncthreads() to coordinate block-level data reuse.
Bank Conflicts: Use padding (e.g., [32][33]) to avoid vertical bank alignment.
Pinned Memory: Use cudaHostAlloc for faster Host-to-Device (H2D) transfers.
